name: Bike Safety Check
description: Help Mrs. Ramirez give the bike a calm pre-ride check.

steps.description: Talk with Mrs. Ramirez by the little bike.
Squeeze the brake levers and feel them catch.
Press the tire and notice whether it feels ready.
Turn the pedal slowly and watch the chain.
Tell Mrs. Ramirez how the bike feels.

success_dialogue: That was careful work, Zuzu. Your bike will trust you for it.
reward_text: You earned a small allowance boost, 5 reputation, and the Safety Star badge.
